purpose: Apply KR Core V2 resource profiles, element constraints and terminology bindings when Clinical Interview data is projected for Korean FHIR exchange.

scope.questionnaire: KR Core V2 does not define a Questionnaire or QuestionnaireResponse profile; dynamic and fixed instruments remain FHIR R4 resources unless a separately authorized Korean questionnaire profile is supplied.
scope.resource_projection: Patient, Condition, AllergyIntolerance, Observation, DiagnosticReport, MedicationRequest, Medication, Immunization, Procedure and other supported resources use an explicitly selected KR Core V2 profile and applicable KR Core Extension.
scope.clinical_collection: KR Core constraints inform interoperability projection and missing-data reporting but do not independently create clinical questions, change safety routing or declare interview completion.
scope.terminology: KR Core ValueSet and CodeSystem content is already loaded in STOM and is referenced by canonical URL rather than duplicated in this repository.

profile_selection.rule: A KR Core profile must be selected from encounter, result, medication, immunization or export context. Resource type alone is insufficient when more than one KR Core profile exists.
profile_selection.multiple_compatible_profiles: A shared element binding may be used when every selected profile has the same strength and canonical ValueSet.
profile_selection.multiple_incompatible_profiles: Split the projection by target profile; do not merge incompatible bindings.
profile_selection.resource_without_kr_core_profile: Use base FHIR R4 and report that KR Core V2 has no corresponding profile.

terminology_service.missing_canonical_behavior: retain the canonical reference, mark terminology verification incomplete and block a conformance claim; clinical interview safety behavior remains unchanged

projection.meta_profile: Projected resources declare the selected KR Core StructureDefinition canonical in meta.profile.
projection.must_support: Must Support and minimum-cardinality gaps are reported for clinician or system completion; they are not silently fabricated.
projection.terminology_binding: The selected profile element binding replaces the base FHIR binding when it is more specific.
projection.questionnaire_item: Questionnaire.item.answerValueSet uses the effective binding when the question directly collects that projected element.
projection.questionnaire_response: Coded answers retain system, code, display and version suitable for later KR Core resource projection.
projection.data_absent: FHIR dataAbsentReason and platform absent-data states remain separate from clinical answer ValueSets.
